name: VaultSparkStudios.github.io
currentFocus: S70 turned the audit into a live public intelligence and policy-generation layer: generated truth JSON, live Studio Pulse, shared proof runtime, adaptive CTAs, stage-based funnel telemetry, a shared CSP source, and hardened investor redirects. Immediate focus is now the next-order integration pass: Studio Hub/social-dashboard bridge work, stronger cohesion across public surfaces, and an AI/pathways layer.
nextMilestone: Complete the audit follow-through by extending the public intelligence bridge into Studio Hub/social signals, shipping higher-order guidance/personalization layers, and refreshing IGNIS after the new architectural baseline is in place.
blockers: CF_WORKER_API_TOKEN missing, so Worker deploys still require local Wrangler auth
Public intelligence JSON exists but generation is not yet automated in closeout/build flow
Annual Stripe price IDs still do not exist for the billing toggle
IGNIS refresh failed in closeout; current score still dates to 2026-04-07
Studio Hub / social dashboard / public site do not yet share one public-safe intelligence contract
